nasb.text: The sons of Ulam were mighty men of valor, archers, and had many sons and grandsons, 150 of them. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.

esv.text: The sons of Ulam were men who were mighty warriors, bowmen, having many sons and grandsons, 150. All these were Benjaminites.

cnv.text: 烏蘭的兒子都是英勇的戰士，是弓箭手；他們有很多子孫，共有一百五十名，都是便雅憫支派的。

ccb.text: 乌兰的儿子都是善射的英勇战士。他们子孙昌盛，共有一百五十人。以上都是便雅悯支派的人。
